before.behavior: RuntimeConditionValueRegistries.FirstOrDefault() used globally for every stage's Requires conditions, regardless of which combination/RulePack was in play.
before.harmlessOnlyBecause: exactly one RuntimeConditionValueRegistryDefinition has ever existed in this catalog

after.D1_WorkoutProgressionValidator: FirstOrDefault() and all Requires-vs-registry logic deleted entirely. Now validates only local structure (stage identity, ordering, candidate existence for both shapes, phase/family eligibility, fallback validity, Requires field shape). Confirmed zero references to RuntimeConditionValueRegistry remain in this file.
after.D2_CandidatePublishGraphValidator: New ValidatePinnedRegistry: combination.RulePack (exact) -> rulePack.RuntimeConditionValueRegistry (exact) -> validates Requires against exactly that registry. Failure code RUNTIME_CONDITION_VALUE_NOT_ALLOWED_BY_PINNED_REGISTRY.

proof.fixtureDescription: Two isolated registry versions (REGISTRY_WITH_VALUE, REGISTRY_WITHOUT_VALUE) added to the snapshot in reverse-of-correct order, never added to the permanent catalog.
